prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为25631→30557→31134→34819→33985名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年从31134名后移至33985名，累计后移约2851名；2025年基准约33985名，较2024年略有回升（前移834名），但仍在3.4万附近高位；本省物理类计划2021年89人、2022年90人、2023年89人、2024年95人、2025年95人；2026年计划95人，与2025年持平，无扩招缓解效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第84名（华北电力大学整体），近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属于中上水平211；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度未进入全国前100名，短视频平台关注度一般，报考热度无明显异常信号；电气工程（A）、动力工程及工程热物理（A-）为国家级优势学科，电力行业特色鲜明，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化2024年专业热度评为"高热推荐"，能源动力类评为"推荐"，相关工科专业社会热度持续偏高；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年（约35.8万）大幅增长约45.5%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约37.9万人，竞争显著加剧，物理类本科批2021–2025年分别为417→429→448→462→463分，呈逐年小幅上升趋势，反映整体竞争强度提升；学校位于河北省保定市，非江苏省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；在江苏省招生计划占比极小，跨省报考需考虑地域适应成本。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年招生计划持平、江苏省考生总数大幅增加（物理类增幅约45.5%）以及电气类专业持续高热等多重因素，竞争压力明显上升，预计2026年最低位次在2025年33985名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约34285名，区间33785–34785名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 25631 → 30557 → 31134 → 34819 → 33985, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall. In the recent 3 years, it moved from 31134 to 33985, a cumulative backward shift of about 2851 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 33985, slightly recovered from 2024 (forward by 834 places), but still near the high level of 34,000. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 89 in 2021, 90 in 2022, 89 in 2023, 95 in 2024, and 95 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 95, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to alleviate pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 84th (overall for North China Electric Power University), with recent rankings stable in the 75–84 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, and short video platform attention is average, with no abnormal signals in application popularity. Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-) are national-level advantageous disciplines, with distinctive characteristics in the power industry, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as 'highly recommended', Energy and Power Engineering as 'recommended', and related engineering majors continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.5% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). By historical proportion, it is estimated that there are about 379,000 Physics Category candidates, with significantly intensified competition. The Physics Category undergraduate batch scores from 2021 to 2025 were 417 → 429 → 448 → 462 → 463, showing a gradual upward trend year by year, reflecting an overall increase in competition intensity. The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local university in Jiangsu, with no provincial enrollment preference. Its enrollment plan in Jiangsu Province is extremely small, and cross-provincial application requires consideration of regional adaptation costs.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the fluctuating trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province (Physics Category increase of about 45.5%), and the sustained high popularity of electrical majors, competition pressure has clearly risen. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 33985. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 34285, with a range of 33785–34785.

If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 34700), safely use Tier 3 majors as a fallback to avoid the risk of sliding out of the admission list.
